title: Girl on the Spot
writer: George Blake, Jack Hartfield, Dorcas Cochran
actors: Lois Collier, Jess Barker, George Dolenz
plot: Eleven Gilbert & Sullivan numbers are melded within the murder-mystery plot of "Girl on the Spot", with a result that either G&S and/or the plot are always seemingly on stage-wait or in the wings awaiting a cue. Lois Collier is th...
